word_list.pronunciation: æz ɔːɹ hˈæpi ɔːɹ mˈɛɹi æz ɐ kɹˈɪkɪt

senses.definition: used to describe a carefree and happy individual

examples.x: After receiving the good news, Sarah was happy as a cricket.
Whenever she's in the garden, Grandma is merry as a cricket.

senses.definition: an individual who is very energetic and in high spirits

examples.x: As soon as the band started playing, the lead singer lit up the stage like a ball of fire, captivating the audience with her incredible voice and stage presence.
From the moment she stepped on the dance floor, Sarah was a ball of fire, showcasing her incredible talent and captivating everyone with her moves.
Samantha is a ball of fire on the basketball court.
The young entrepreneur started her own company and quickly became a ball of fire in the business world, achieving remarkable success.

senses.definition: someone who has the mentality and behavior of that of a young person

examples.x: Despite being 60, Jane is young at heart and loves going on spontaneous adventures.
Emily's joyful laughter and love for dancing make her young at heart.
Even in her 50s, Lisa's passion for painting shows she is young at heart.
Grandpa may be 80, but he's young at heart and enjoys playing video games with his grandchildren.

senses.definition: one's ability to say funny things or be amused by jokes and other things meant to make one laugh

examples.x: John's dry sense of humor catches people off guard with his deadpan one-liners.
Samantha's sarcastic sense of humor shines through her witty remarks.
He uses his sense of humor to connect with people and make them feel comfortable.

senses.definition: a person who likes spending a lot of time in parties

examples.x: John is known as the ultimate party animal, telling jokes and getting everyone involved.
Lisa has a reputation as a party animal, never missing a social event and spreading contagious enthusiasm.
Sarah is a party animal, always the first on the dance floor and keeping the energy high.

senses.definition: an individual behaving in an energetic or unpredictable manner

examples.x: Carla is a live wire in social gatherings, filling the room with excitement through her stories and contagious laughter."
Emma is a live wire in the office, creating a vibrant and energetic atmosphere with her enthusiasm.
Mark is a live wire at parties, getting the crowd excited with his spontaneous dance moves.
Sarah is a live wire, always buzzing with energy and keeping everyone around her energized.
Tommy is a live wire on the sports field, inspiring his teammates with his relentless energy.

senses.definition: (of a person) bursting with energy and in high spirits

examples.x: At 80 years old, Grandma Mary is still full of life, always up for an adventure.
Jane is always full of life, lighting up any room with her infectious energy.
Michael's paintings are vibrant, full of life and capturing the essence of his subjects.
The children at the playground were full of life, joyfully running around and playing.
The musical performance was electrifying, full of life and energy that filled the venue.

senses.definition: full of positive energy and excitement

examples.x: After a good night's sleep, I woke up feeling full of beans and ready to tackle the day.
Johnny is always full of beans, running and laughing everywhere he goes.
The team came into the game full of beans, ready to give it their all.

senses.definition: someone who is very socially active and goes to many parties or social events

examples.x: Sarah is a real social butterfly.

word_list.pronunciation: ðə lˈaɪf ʌvðə pˈɑːɹɾi ɔːɹ ɪvˈɛnt ɔːɹ ɡˈæðɚɹɪŋ

senses.definition: an energetic person at a party or other social events

examples.x: With her witty jokes and outgoing personality, Sarah is always the life of the party.

senses.definition: (of a person) alert and full of energy and enthusiasm

examples.x: After a good night's sleep, she woke up feeling as fresh as a daisy.
After a refreshing swim, he emerged from the pool feeling fresh as a daisy.
Despite the long hike, he looked fresh as a daisy and ready for more.
Even after a busy day at work, she arrived at the party looking as fresh as a daisy.
She may have had a late night, but she woke up the next morning looking as fresh as a daisy.
